title: BUG: Add delimiters to NameObject.renumber_table
body:
Per the PDF specification, name objects cannot contain unescaped delimiters, including angle brackets, curly braces, and square brackets. The current implementation of NameObject.renumber_table does not provide mappings for these delimiters, which can lead to incorrectly escaped names and invalid PDFs when appending to a PdfWriter.

Proposed change:
- Extend NameObject.renumber_table to include the following delimiter mappings:
  - "<": b"#3C"  (less-than)
  - ">": b"#3E"  (greater-than)
  - "[": b"#5B"  (open bracket)
  - "]": b"#5D"  (close bracket)
  - "{": b"#7B"  (open brace)
  - "}": b"#7D"  (close brace)
- These characters are currently delimited by the existing delimiter_pattern (which already includes brackets and braces), but they are not escaped in the renumber_table, so they would be emitted as-is for many typical names.
- Since NameObject.renumber() uses renumber_table for characters up to '~', adding these entries ensures proper escaping during name serialization.
- This change is additive and maintains backward compatibility; it only affects how certain characters are escaped when serializing NameObject values.
- Optional follow-up: add a unit test that asserts a NameObject containing these delimiters is correctly escaped (e.g., NameObject("/Test<Brackets>") should produce a name string with "#3C" for '<' and so on).

step_plan.summary: Add delimiter escapes to NameObject.renumber_table as per PDF spec (escape <, >, [, ], {, }) and ensure NameObject.renumber uses the updated mapping, maintaining compatibility and enabling a future unit test for proper escaping.

steps.operation: Extend renumber_table mappings to escape delimiters
steps.reason: PDF name objects must escape delimiters; adding mappings for <, >, [, ], {, } prevents invalid PDFs when names contain these characters
steps.side_effects: Broadens escaping; may require updating or adding unit tests to cover new mappings; preserves backward compatibility

steps.operation: Verify and ensure NameObject.renumber uses renumber_table for escaping (and adjust if necessary)
steps.reason: Make sure renumber() leverages the extended renumber_table so new delimiter mappings are applied during serialization
steps.side_effects: Possible minor regression risk if renumber logic diverges; may require tests to validate new escaping behavior for delimiters
